title: The Faulty Reactor
setting: A high-precision optical physics cleanroom. Teal laser diagnostics and vacuum chambers.
narrative_introduction: The lens opens into a diagnostic cleanroom. Precision optical mirrors, vacuum lines, and diagnostic laser arrays. Do not look for disaster. Notice the tiny physical variance before the reaction cascades.

mechanics.observation: Locked-off 2-second cinematic moment. A research physicist taps a calibration key, watches a diagnostic laser beam shift 0.2 millimeters across a quartz sensor, and immediately engages the magnetic isolation seal.
mechanics.memory: Spatial fragment placement. Reconstruct the optical cleanroom: quartz sensor array, calibration key, diagnostic laser beam, magnetic isolation seal, cleanroom logbook, vacuum gauge.
mechanics.discovery: Frozen moment exploration. Attuning to the quartz sensor and vacuum gauge reveals the micro-oscillation that predicted the thermal spike.
mechanics.evidence: Archive entry reveals that the physicist's split-second observation prevented a complete loss of the crystalline core.
mechanics.reflection: Iris voice synthesizes the power of precise observation. Archive entry: 'The Faulty Reactor'.

environment.location: optical physics cleanroom, diagnostic control console

lighting.key_detail: laser beam deflection across the etched quartz target grid

camera.depth_of_field: deep, entire optical table and diagnostic array sharp
camera.color_grade: crisp laboratory cyan, stainless steel silver, vibrant laser teal

animation.physicist: taps calibration key (0.5s) -> observes laser shift (0.8s) -> engages isolation seal (0.7s) = 2.0s
animation.laser_beam: deflects 0.2mm right along the quartz target reticle
animation.vacuum_gauge: needle drops slightly during the magnetic seal engagement

ambient_details: precision quartz beam-splitter mounted on optical breadboard
stainless steel calibration key with red safety collar
research logbook open to page 412 with complex differential equations
magnetic isolation seal lever with glowing green status LED

audio.base_layer: cleanroom laminar airflow drone, vacuum pump high-pitch thrum
audio.focus_layer: mechanical key click, quartz resonance, heavy magnetic seal clank
audio.transition: clean 800 Hz diagnostic electronic pure tone

subtle: laser shift is less than half a millimeter
vacuum gauge needle flickers exactly as the beam deflects
deep: logbook equation predicts the exact deflection angle for thermal expansion
isolation seal LED turns from amber to solid green
intentionally_missed_first_view: quartz core inside the chamber shows a hairline optical strain wave

reconstruction.iris_prompt: Reconstruct the cleanroom table. Place the instruments of precision.

attunements.reveals: laser deflection measures 0.18mm—the exact threshold where crystal lattice strain begins
chamber temperature rose 0.04 Kelvin 200ms before the deflection
seal engaged 120 milliseconds before lattice fracture limit was reached

investigation.iris_intervention: You have witnessed exact science. Observation is not passive recording; it is the boundary between order and chaos.

revelation.iris_response: You noticed the micro-deflection across the quartz reticle. You noticed the vacuum flicker. You noticed the exact timing of the magnetic isolation seal. True observation catches the divergence before the cascade.

archive_mapping.title: The Faulty Reactor
archive_mapping.iris_note: A fraction of a millimeter on the quartz grid stood between routine calibration and structural loss.
